typography.heading: Outfit, sans-serif
typography.description: Outfit provides a clean, modern, and structured feel for financial numbers and headings, while DM Sans ensures high legibility and warmth for dense data in tables and lists.

colors.description: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy). The base is a warm off-white (like raw cotton), primary is Terracotta/Rust (evoking spices), secondary is Turmeric. Success is a grounded Sage Green. This balances the strict utility of an accounting app with the warmth of traditional Indian retail.

layouts.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background relative pb-24 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
layouts.navigation: Fixed bottom tab bar. Do not use a desktop-style top header or sidebar. The app must feel like a native mobile app.
layouts.cards: Use 'Bento' style dense grids on the dashboard. Use `rounded-2xl` for large cards, `rounded-xl` for smaller inputs.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing `p-4` to `p-6` inside cards. Large `gap-4` between sections.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-xl. Primary buttons must use the Terracotta color. Minimum height `48px` (h-12) for fat finger taps.
components.inputs: Shadcn standard inputs but heavily customized: `h-12`, `rounded-xl`, `bg-white`, warm subtle borders. Use explicit `focus:ring-primary`.
components.pin_screen: A full-screen numeric keypad grid `grid-cols-3` with large circular or softly rounded square buttons for PIN entry.
components.charts: Recharts. Use simple AreaChart or BarChart. Remove heavy gridlines. Use `stopColor` gradients for area fills.

masala.description: Table topped with raw Indian spices. Use as a thumbnail for the Masala SKU category.

biscuits.description: Brown cookies/biscuits. Use as a thumbnail for the Biscuits SKU category.

namkeen.description: Assortment of Indian snacks. Use as a thumbnail for the Namkeen SKU category.

motion.interactions: Use `framer-motion` for page transitions (slide up/fade) and `whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}` on all primary buttons and interactive cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup `index.css` with the provided HSL color variables.
2. Update `tailwind.config.js` to include fonts: `heading: ['Outfit', 'sans-serif']` and `body: ['DM Sans', 'sans-serif']`.
3. Scaffold a single-page app (or use React Router) wrapped in a mobile frame (`max-w-md mx-auto relative`).
4. Implement the PIN Lock screen first. It should block access until a simple hardcoded PIN (e.g., '1234') is entered.
5. Build the Dashboard: Big 'Net Profit' card, a smaller Recharts area chart for MoM trend, and quick action FABs or grid buttons (Purchase, Sale).
6. Build the Purchase/Sale forms: Must have a toggle for Wholesaler vs Retailer (for sales). Ensure Box-to-Unit math is automatically calculated.
7. Build the Stock & Profit Report tables. Make them swipeable or dense enough for mobile.
8. Use `data-testid` on all inputs, buttons, and crucial data points (like profit display).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics. Do NOT use default blue/indigo colors. Stick to the warm Indian retail palette (Terracotta, Turmeric, warm off-white).
Do NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`.
Do NOT center align the app container text, keep it left-aligned for natural reading.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, press states.
NEVER use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs for category thumbnails.
Ensure all monetary values use the Indian Rupee symbol (₹).
